Meet ZAKI: The personal AI shaped by our culture, built to understand you.

⚡Your ideas just found their favorite thinking partner.
🎉 ZAKI is 1 week old

Start your relationship with ZAKI today

ZAKI is now live. Subscribe and start building a personal, memory-aware workflow that evolves with you.

  • Personal assistant, not just a chatbot
  • Culturally-aware conversations
  • Memory with full user control

Jump to plans below to choose Student or Personal.

✨ Coming soon: ZAKI Inner Circle

A limited campaign for early supporters who believe AI should be personal, culturally aware, and always user-controlled. 🧠🌍🔐

Want a free access code? DM us on Instagram after follow + share to request access codes: @chatzaki.ai

The Arab world thinks, speaks, and works differently.
So why does AI still feel foreign?
In a region rich with culture, nuance, and context, most tools miss the point. They don't understand how we speak, what we mean, or how we actually get things done.
That's why we built Zaki. 😎
Culturally aware AI that is personal by design, Zaki's memory layer is built to be managed and controlled by you. 🫵🏼
Plan your day, write, think, translate, decide, naturally, effortlessly.
No friction. No awkward prompts.
Just keep up with its edgy comments and wit.
Just intelligence that feels local, useful, and human. 🇬🇧🇸🇦🇱🇧🇸🇾

Follow updates

Built to be truly yours, wrapped in authenticity and high-impact intelligence.

Structured thinking

Analyze topics, break down ideas, summarize content, and explore decisions with clear logic.

Spaces for your work

Create spaces for research, planning, learning, and personal use. Keep context where it belongs.

Memory that stays useful

Capture preferences and facts with review flows, conflict checks, and clarity controls.

Security and control

Operate with strong account controls, policy transparency, and production-focused safeguards.

Zaki gets you

Here is the story.

Origin

Culture Shapes Models

LLMs are shaped by the data they are trained on. That data carries language, assumptions, and cultural patterns. So intelligence is never neutral, it reflects its source.

Gap

Context Gap

Most global models miss Arab nuance in tone, meaning, and intent. They often return generic answers that feel technically correct but culturally off. That is the gap Zaki is built to close.

Launch

Levant First

We start with Zaki Levant, built by a team with Levantine roots. This gives us a focused base to model real regional expression. From there, we expand with depth, not guesswork.

Learn

Grows With You

Zaki learns from user interaction through memory and review loops. You can approve, edit, or reject what is remembered. Personalization grows with trust and stays under your control.

Focus

Feature Stack

Spaces keep context organized for each project and workflow. Memory keeps continuity so conversations become more useful over time. Conflict handling and review flows keep outputs stable and clear.

Vision

Flagship Path

The goal is an authentic Arabic model users truly relate to. Not generic global replies, but intelligence with local relevance. Zaki is the foundation we are building into that flagship.

Where ZAKI fits best

Work

Plan faster, write sharper, and make clearer decisions with context-aware support.

Learning

Summarize, explain, and translate ideas in a way that stays relevant to your context.

Personal

Get memory-aware help for your day-to-day flow with control over what Zaki keeps.

Built with memory review and user control by default.

Simple plans for a more personal ZAKI

Start free, upgrade when you want more, or gift one focused month of ZAKI to someone who needs a real personal AI assistant.

Student
$8 / month

For focused studying, clearer writing, and better support across coursework.

  • Premium models for better answers
  • Priority responses during busy hours
  • Stronger help with notes, drafts, and study sessions
Choose Student
Personal
$13 / month

For everyday work and life when you want ZAKI to feel like your assistant.

  • Premium models with richer reasoning
  • Priority responses and stronger context
  • More personal memory and assistant-style support
Choose Personal

  • Delivered by email after purchase

Student requires a .edu email or manual verification with proof of enrollment.

Ready for AI that feels made for you?

Tell us what you want in AI next. We will make it happen together.

Help shape ZAKI

Simple, public, and anonymous by default.

Loading feedback...

Impossible is nothing.

FAQs

Zaki is our attempt to build culturally aware Arabic intelligence, not generic global output. We believe AI should understand how people actually speak, think, and decide in their own context.

We are Nova Nuggets L.L.C, an AI company founded by Arab expats. Our team works across time zones from Tokyo to Canada, with Dubai as HQ and a base in Hamburg, Germany.

Today, Zaki focuses on text generation using open-source models. Image generation and broader capabilities are planned for upcoming releases.

Most models are trained for global averages. Zaki is being shaped for local nuance, especially Levantine and Arabic-first context, so answers feel relevant, not distant.

User interaction is essential. Every meaningful conversation helps us refine behavior, memory quality, and cultural alignment. We are building intelligence that grows with its users.

We operate from Europe and align with strict EU data privacy standards. We take secure handling seriously and design memory flows with review and user control in mind.

Zaki is currently self-funded. We are focused on technology first, and we are building sustainably while trying to keep access as open as possible.

Use Zaki, share it, and give us feedback. Support can be financial, marketing, community advocacy, or daily usage. Every form of support helps us build a stronger Arabic AI future.

Because this is the critical phase where real usage shapes real intelligence. Every conversation, referral, and contribution helps us build an Arabic AI people can genuinely trust and relate to.

Here.
